note: Same mechanism as data/seed/roster_overrides_nba.json: real contracts basketball-reference's own contracts pages haven't caught up to yet (brand-new free-agent signings won't appear on ANY team's bref page for weeks). Applied on top of the bref scrape in data/update_player_salaries.py by player_id. Remove an entry once bref's own data reflects it.

overrides.note: Average annual value of a 3yr/$47.4M deal signed 2026-07-06 (exact year-1 breakdown not publicly available at research time) — used as a single-season estimate.
